creator: msaitoh@spa.is.uec.ac.jp
text:
manpage says:

  + RETURN VALUES
  +  Upon success, the number of bytes actually transferred is returned.  Oth-
  +  erwise, -1 is returned.

	but, it returns 0 on error.

	And, some programs ckecks like:

		if (kvm_read(kd, addr, buf, len) < 0)

	This causes serious problems.

Fix: 

return -1 on error.
How-To-Repeat: 
	This bug cause pidentd to infinite-loops.
